tabs.species: Folk sets your combat role, AC, initiative, and three biology abilities. Stats are built separately on the Stats tab.
tabs.appearance: Body pattern, tint, and markings are cosmetic — they show on your portrait in the basin and save with your character.
tabs.wardrobe: Hat, cloak, and accessory layers stack on your portrait. Cosmetic only in this slice — no stat changes.
tabs.stats: Standard 5e point-buy: 27 points, scores 8–15 before racial +2/+1. Higher stats improve dialogue dice and combat rolls.
tabs.kit: Your folk's three combat abilities — used in turn-based fights. Species kit is fixed; you customize stats instead.
tabs.skills: Dialogue uses d20 + ability modifier vs DC. Labels like Persuasion map to CHA, Insight to WIS, etc.
tabs.story: Name appears in dialogue and the HUD. Motivation sets world flags Pip and others can reference.
tabs.settings: Controls the first minutes after you enter — narration and hint toasts only affect a new game.
tabs.review: Final check before entering the Causeway. Fix red warnings before Enter.

str.label: Strength
str.inGame: Basic Attack in combat. Rare in dialogue this slice.

dex.label: Dexterity
dex.modAffects: Initiative-adjacent checks; amphibians get advantage on some DEX dialogue in rain.
dex.inGame: Movement feel; rain buffs frog/toad in combat and travel.

con.label: Constitution
con.inGame: Tank folk start with higher CON spreads — soak damage in fights.

int.label: Intelligence
int.inGame: History check with Elder Domet on levy law (DC 13). Kess ridge lines use INT.

wis.label: Wisdom
wis.inGame: Insight with Pip on the levy (DC 12). Enemy WIS saves vs some abilities.

cha.label: Charisma
cha.inGame: Persuade Grizz on the ferry toll (DC 12). Social item bonuses stack on CHA checks.

skills.name: Insight
skills.inGame: Pip — read whether the levy story holds (Causeway / Lilymarket).

skills.name: History
skills.inGame: Elder Domet — cite the Charter's fifteen-percent flow limit.

skills.name: Persuasion
skills.inGame: Grizz — petition to cross without paying the toll.

skills.name: Intimidation
skills.inGame: Combat diplomacy before Blackfen poachers fight.

skills.name: Athletics
skills.inGame: Reserved for future physical gates — not in vertical slice dialogue yet.

skills.name: Stealth
skills.inGame: Toad burrow flavor; no dialogue DC in slice.

skipOpeningNarration.label: Skip opening narration
skipOpeningNarration.description: Enter the Causeway immediately — no 3-line intro beat. Good for repeat playtests.

showControlHints.label: Show control hints
showControlHints.description: After the intro (or on enter if narration skipped), toast click-to-move, E, and journal keys.

appearance.variant: Alternate pixel patterns on your folk's body — four palettes per species.
appearance.hueShift: Tints every body color warmer or cooler (−30 to +30).

marking.spots: Soft spots on the torso and limbs.

motivations.investigator: Sets arrival_investigator — Pip treats you as hired to find the truth.
motivations.messenger: Sets arrival_messenger — you're delivering someone else's worry.
motivations.neighbor: Sets arrival_neighbor — personal stake in the basin, not abstract duty.

wardrobeNote: Outfits render on your portrait in-game. All wardrobe is cosmetic in the vertical slice.
